title: Red Pizzas for a Blue Count
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo and his family rush to a spooky castle to rescue cousin Trap, only to find he's fine — and that the creepy count and countess are really bats who love bug pizzas! 🍕

q.en: Who is the narrator of this story, and what is his job?
q.zh: 这个故事是谁在讲述？他的工作是什么？

options.en: Trap, who is the king of Transratania
options.zh: 特拉普，他是特拉特兰尼亚的国王

options.en: Benjamin, who is the cook at the ball
options.zh: 本杰明，他是舞会上的厨师

options.en: Geronimo Stilton, who runs a newspaper called The Rodent's Gazette
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿，他经营着一份名叫《老鼠公报》的报纸

options.en: Thea, who owns the Ratoff Castle
options.zh: 蒂奥拉，她拥有拉托夫城堡

explain.en: Geronimo is the narrator and he runs The Rodent's Gazette newspaper.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩是故事的讲述者，他经营着《老鼠公报》这份报纸。

q.en: At the beginning of the story, who calls Geronimo late at night and says he is in Transratania?
q.zh: 故事一开始，是谁在深夜给杰罗尼摩打电话，说自己身在特拉特兰尼亚？

explain.en: Trap phones Geronimo in the middle of the night, pretending to be in trouble in Transratania.
explain.zh: 特拉普在午夜给杰罗尼摩打电话，假装自己在特拉特兰尼亚遇到了麻烦。

q.en: How do Geronimo, Thea, and Benjamin travel to Transratania?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩、蒂奥拉和本杰明是怎样前往特拉特兰尼亚的？

explain.en: They take a train that leaves at half-past six in the morning and arrives at Ratoff station.
explain.zh: 他们乘坐早上六点半出发的火车，抵达拉托夫车站。

q.en: Why do the mice in the village of Ratoff wear garlic necklaces and bracelets?
q.zh: 拉托夫村的老鼠们为什么戴着大蒜项链和手链？

options.en: As a fashion trend from the city
options.zh: 作为城里流行的一种时尚

options.en: Because garlic is their favorite food
options.zh: 因为大蒜是他们最喜欢的食物

explain.en: Geronimo realizes the rodents keep so much garlic because some say garlic keeps vampires away.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩意识到，这些老鼠储存大量大蒜是因为传说大蒜可以驱赶吸血鬼。

q.en: What is the name of the hunchback servant at the castle?
q.zh: 城堡里那个驼背仆人的名字叫什么？

explain.en: When asked his name, the hunchback shrieks 'DON'T BOTHER ME!', so Benjamin calls him Mr. Don't-Bother-Me.
explain.zh: 当被问到名字时，驼背仆人大喊'别来烦我！'，于是本杰明便叫他'别来烦我先生'。

q.en: Who is the young Countess Snobella engaged to marry?
q.zh: 年轻的斯诺贝拉伯爵小姐的未婚夫是谁？

explain.en: Snobella shows Thea fifty dozen red roses from her fiancé, Count Schnoz von der Nose.
explain.zh: 斯诺贝拉向蒂奥拉展示了未婚夫施诺兹·冯·德·诺斯伯爵送的五六十打红玫瑰。

q.en: What does Trap discover about his family background?
q.zh: 特拉普发现了自己家族的什么秘密？

options.en: He is the king of Transratania
options.zh: 他是特拉特兰尼亚的国王

options.en: He is related to Geronimo's newspaper rival
options.zh: 他与杰罗尼摩的报纸对手有亲戚关系

options.en: He is Count von Ratoff's long-lost son
options.zh: 他是拉托夫伯爵失散多年的儿子

options.en: He may be a descendant of the noble Von Trappen family
options.zh: 他可能是高贵的冯·特拉彭家族的后代

explain.en: Trap used a family research agency and found he may be a descendant of Trip von Trappen of Transratania.
explain.zh: 特拉普通过一家家族调查机构，发现自己可能是特拉特兰尼亚特里普·冯·特拉彭的后代。

q.en: How many guests come to the ball at the castle?
q.zh: 城堡舞会上一共有多少位客人？

explain.en: Trap complains he cannot tell 347 guests they can chew their nails for dinner.
explain.zh: 特拉普抱怨说，他不能告诉三百四十七位客人晚餐只能啃指甲。

q.en: When Trap's fancy insect dinner is ruined, what does he serve the guests instead?
q.zh: 当特拉普精心准备的昆虫大餐烧焦后，他改请客人们吃什么？

explain.en: Trap makes pizzas topped with puréed ants, spicy earthworms, and broiled bumblebees, and the guests love them.
explain.zh: 特拉普做了配料是蚂蚁泥、辣蚯蚓和烤大黄蜂的比萨，客人们都很喜欢。

q.en: What is the surprising secret about Count von Ratoff and his niece Snobella?
q.zh: 关于拉托夫伯爵和侄女斯诺贝拉，令人吃惊的秘密是什么？

options.en: They are vampires who drink blood
They are actually bats, not mice
options.zh: 他们其实是蝙蝠，而不是老鼠
他们是杰罗尼摩失散多年的亲戚
他们是著名的电影明星

explain.en: Snobella opens her cape to reveal giant wings; the count and niece are a family of bats who eat bugs and sleep upside down.
explain.zh: 斯诺贝拉张开斗篷露出巨大的翅膀；伯爵和侄女其实是一族蝙蝠，它们吃虫子并且倒挂着睡觉。
